## Bifurcation Analysis

```{python}
from IPython.display import Markdown
from tvbo import Continuation, Dynamics, SimulationExperiment
model = Dynamics.from_ontology('Generic2dOscillator')

cont = Continuation.from_string(
"""\
name: eq_in_a
label: "Equilibrium branch in a"

description: >-
    Continue the equilibrium branch of the Generic2dOscillator as parameter a is varied. Detect Hopf bifurcations and continue periodic orbits from all Hopf points.

dynamics: Generic2dOscillator

free_parameters:
    - name: I
      domain:
          lo: "-10"
          hi: "20"

branches:
    - name: po_from_hopf
      source_point: "hopf:all"
"""
)

exp = SimulationExperiment(dynamics=model, continuations=[cont])
bif_result_jl = exp.run("bifurcationkit.jl")
bif_result_jl.plot(VOI='V')
```

## Different Backends

```{python}
bif_result_py = exp.run("pyrates-bifurcation")
bif_result_py.plot(VOI='V')
```
